nasb.text: Then Joab came to the king and said, “What have you done? Behold, Abner came to you; why then have you sent him away and he is already gone?

esv.text: Then Joab went to the king and said, “What have you done? Behold, Abner came to you. Why is it that you have sent him away, so that he is gone?

cnv.text: 約押進去見王，說：“你作了甚麼事？押尼珥來見你，你為甚麼把他送走？現在他已經走了。

ccb.text: 约押听后，就去见王，说：“你这做的是什么事？押尼珥来见你，你为什么放他走呢？
